channel.title: Blog on Cole World
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Cole World

item.title: New features in Blog 2.0
item.description: Admonition Shortcode This is a tip A tip banner This is a note A note banner This is a info A info banner This is a success A success banner This is a warning A warning banner This is a failure A failure banner This is a danger A danger banner This is a bug A bug banner MathJax Support Demo \begin{equation} \int_{0}^{1} \int_{0}^{1} \int_{0}^{1} \int_{0}^{1} \frac{1}{1 + x_1 x_2 x_3 x_4} , dx_4 , dx_3 , dx_2 , dx_1 \end{equation}

item.title: This is my first blog
item.description: Hello Hugo! The world’s fastest framework for building websites
